mapper.sql: hg.goal_id, hg.goal_code, hg.goal_name, hg.goal_description, hg.metric_type, hg.unit, hg.default_target_min, hg.default_target_max, hg.default_target_text, hg.sort_no, hg.goal_status, hg.created_by, hg.created_time, hg.last_change_time
mapper.select:
SELECT , u.account AS creator_account, COALESCE(NULLIF(u.realname, ''), NULLIF(u.nickname, ''), u.account) AS creator_name FROM t_health_goal hg LEFT JOIN t_user u ON hg.created_by = u.user_id WHERE 1 = 1
AND hg.goal_status = #{goalStatus}
AND ( hg.goal_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR hg.goal_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR IFNULL(hg.goal_description, '') LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
ORDER BY hg.sort_no ASC, hg.goal_id ASC

SELECT , u.account AS creator_account, COALESCE(NULLIF(u.realname, ''), NULLIF(u.nickname, ''), u.account) AS creator_name FROM t_health_goal hg LEFT JOIN t_user u ON hg.created_by = u.user_id WHERE hg.goal_id = #{goalId} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_health_goal ( goal_code, goal_name, goal_description, metric_type, unit, default_target_min, default_target_max, default_target_text, sort_no, goal_status, created_by ) VALUES ( #{goalCode}, #{goalName}, #{goalDescription}, #{metricType}, #{unit}, #{defaultTargetMin}, #{defaultTargetMax}, #{defaultTargetText}, #{sortNo}, #{goalStatus}, #{createdBy} )
mapper.update: UPDATE t_health_goal SET goal_code = #{goalCode}, goal_name = #{goalName}, goal_description = #{goalDescription}, metric_type = #{metricType}, unit = #{unit}, default_target_min = #{defaultTargetMin}, default_target_max = #{defaultTargetMax}, default_target_text = #{defaultTargetText}, sort_no = #{sortNo}, goal_status = #{goalStatus} WHERE goal_id = #{goalId}
mapper.select:
SELECT , ug.user_goal_id, ug.user_goal_status, ug.target_min, ug.target_max, ug.target_text FROM t_health_goal hg LEFT JOIN t_user_health_goal ug ON ug.goal_id = hg.goal_id AND ug.user_id = #{userId} WHERE hg.goal_status = 0
AND ( hg.goal_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR hg.goal_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR IFNULL(hg.goal_description, '') LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
ORDER BY hg.sort_no ASC, hg.goal_id ASC
